profiles.description: App users containing role, active state, status, preferences, and verified badges.

cards.description: Campaign ads published by brands containing category, payout info, status, and details.

rooms.description: Chat rooms connecting brand, influencer, and link to campaign cards / group structures.

messages.description: Messaging logs supporting replies, stars, pins, attachment URLs, and reaction emojis.

group_members.description: Group participants mapping roles and join requests states.

milestones.description: Milestone deliverables in a contract supporting dates and [EXT:... status] extensions.

collaboration_agreements.description: Legal contract outlines, details, statuses, and signatures.

payment_records.description: Financial ledger tracking escrow, transfer, and payout logs.

disputes.description: Escalation cases raised when contracts are not fulfilled or delayed.

user_reports.description: Moderation reports made by users on profile violations.

user_blocks.description: Blocks log tracking user-to-user blocking configurations.

mcp_keys.description: Secure storage for developer API configuration.
